channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Garden waste dumped on corner of St Kildas and Heathland Road N16, 26th April
item.description:
Garden waste dumped on corner of St Kildas and Heathland Road N16

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heathland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned sign on pavement, 26th April
item.description:
Abandoned sign on pavement. Been here for weeks. Previously reported (ref 9320301), and was incorrectly closed. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 161, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Usual Flytip at top of Stembridge Road, 26th April
item.description:
Usual Flytip at top of Stembridge road. Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stembridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household Rubbish Being Dumped o/s 243 Beckenham Rd / jct Mackenzie Rd, 26th April
item.description:
This is an on-going problem which still hasn’t been resolved. Tenants are dumping their household rubbish as they don’t seem to have been provided waste facilities. Foxes / pigeons split the bags & spread the detrius throughout the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
.

item.title: Bus stop BL Bexleyheath Lion Road : left hand (of 3) timetable displatys has damaged flapping opn door - needs reair and routes 89 96 and 422 timetables replaced, 26th April
item.description:
Bus stop BL Bexleyheath Lion Road: left hand (of 3) timetable displays has damaged flapping open door (both hinges bent) - needs repair and routes 89 96 and 422 timetables replaced. See photographs attached Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 230, Broadway, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wall Damage, 26th April
item.description:
Broken Wall outside flats, 42 Harington Terrace N9 9UN. Debris was on pavement but moved to grass area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Cambridge Road, Edmonton

item.title: Left over concrete from improvement works, 26th April
item.description:
A block and a bollard have been left in a park space to the west of Trafalgar House after building works and need retrieving. They have been here for over a year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bronti Close, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Warneford Street needs a clean, 26th April
item.description:
Rubbish all along street from burst recycling bags put out too early by residents. Grateful if could be cleaned. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warneford Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
